source_label: Chen et al., 'A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations' (arXiv 2002.05709)
notes: Google/Hinton contrastive SSL framework; 'Sim' (Simple) + 'CLR' (Contrastive Learning of Representations) puns on 'clear', so 'sim-CLEAR' dominates; a minority spells it 'sim-C-L-R'.
